prompt: When the second cue appears, choose the best action.
why_v1: Action should change only when the read and board cues support it.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits the cue set, so the line keeps the controlled continue this spot is actually rewarding.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Calling works better because the full cue set still points to a controlled continue instead of forcing action on only one favorable signal.
